title: Formula and Subitems columns in monday.com automatic emails!

posts.author: guy.gavish (Guygav)
posts.cookedHtml:
Did you ever want to use Subitems or Formula columns in your automatic emails from monday.com?

SuperMail has it !

Starting today, you can design your emails with Formula and Subitems columns and change the status of your monday.com column directly from the email.

Give it a try and enjoy

[https://auth.monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000247/supermail](https://Download SuperMail)
